content.problemStatement:
You are given an unweighted directed graph with NNN vertices (numbered 111 through NNN). You are also given 2M2M2M ranges [A1,B1],[A2,B2],‚Ä¶,[AM,BM][A_1, B_1], [A_2, B_2], \ldots, [A_M, B_M][A1‚Äč,B1‚Äč],[A2‚Äč,B2‚Äč],‚Ä¶,[AM‚Äč,BM‚Äč] and [C1,D1],[C2,D2],‚Ä¶,[CM,DM][C_1, D_1], [C_2, D_2], \ldots, [C_M, D_M][C1‚Äč,D1‚Äč],[C2‚Äč,D2‚Äč],‚Ä¶,[CM‚Äč,DM‚Äč] describing the edges of the graph in the following way: For each iii (1‚Č§i‚Č§M1 \le i \le M1‚Č§i‚Č§M) and for each pair of vertices u‚ąą[Ai,Bi]u \in [A_i, B_i]u‚ąą[Ai‚Äč,Bi‚Äč], v‚ąą[Ci,Di]v \in [C_i, D_i]v‚ąą[Ci‚Äč,Di‚Äč], there is an edge from uuu to vvv.

Finally, you are given two vertices XXX and YYY. Find the shortest distance from XXX to YYY or determine that there is no path from XXX to YYY.
constraints: 1‚Č§Ai‚Č§Bi‚Č§N1 \le A_i \le B_i \le N1‚Č§Ai‚Äč‚Č§Bi‚Äč‚Č§N and 1‚Č§Ci‚Č§Di‚Č§N1 \le C_i \le D_i \le N1‚Č§Ci‚Äč‚Č§Di‚Äč‚Č§N for each valid iii
the sum of MMM over all test cases does not exceed 2‚čÖ1052 \cdot 10^52‚čÖ105
the sum of MMM over all test cases does not exceed 5,0005,0005,000
**Subtask #2 (10 points):** for any two of the 2M2M2M given ranges (denoted by [x1,x2][x_1, x_2][x1‚Äč,x2‚Äč] and [x3,x4][x_3, x_4][x3‚Äč,x4‚Äč]), one of the following conditions holds:
they are non-overlapping, i.e. x2<x3x_2 \lt x_3x2‚Äč<x3‚Äč or x4<x1x_4 \lt x_1x4‚Äč<x1‚Äč
**Subtask #3 (20 points):** for any two of the 2M2M2M given ranges (denoted by [x1,x2][x_1, x_2][x1‚Äč,x2‚Äč] and [x3,x4][x_3, x_4][x3‚Äč,x4‚Äč]), one of the following conditions holds:
one range lies inside the other, i.e. x1‚Č§x3‚Č§x4‚Č§x2x_1 \le x_3 \le x_4 \le x_2x1‚Äč‚Č§x3‚Äč‚Č§x4‚Äč‚Č§x2‚Äč or x3‚Č§x1‚Č§x2‚Č§x4x_3 \le x_1 \le x_2 \le x_4x3‚Äč‚Č§x1‚Äč‚Č§x2‚Äč‚Č§x4‚Äč
they are non-overlapping, i.e. x2<x3x_2 \lt x_3x2‚Äč<x3‚Äč or x4<x1x_4 \lt x_1x4‚Äč<x1‚Äč
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains four space-separated integers NNN, MMM, XXX and YYY.
MMM lines follow. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines contains four space-separated integers AiA_iAi‚Äč, BiB_iBi‚Äč, CiC_iCi‚Äč and DiD_iDi‚Äč.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ‚Äē the shortest distance from vertex XXX to vertex YYY, or ‚ąí1-1‚ąí1 if there is no path from XXX to YYY.
